nodes.label: Return the perf adapter for an engine, or raise ValueError.

nodes.label: Static anti-pattern findings from the SQL text.
nodes.norm_label: static anti-pattern findings from the sql text.

nodes.label: Findings from a captured EXPLAIN output (raw file text; format per engine).
nodes.norm_label: findings from a captured explain output (raw file text; format per engine).

nodes.norm_label: postgres performance adapter: static anti-patterns + explain-json parsing.

nodes.label: Findings from Postgres EXPLAIN (FORMAT JSON) output.

nodes.label: Static anti-pattern findings for one SQL statement.
nodes.norm_label: static anti-pattern findings for one sql statement.

nodes.label: Turn dbt `state:modified` selection into a changed-model ChangeSet.
nodes.norm_label: turn dbt `state:modified` selection into a changed-model changeset.

nodes.label: Raised when the `dbt ls` invocation fails.
nodes.norm_label: raised when the `dbt ls` invocation fails.

nodes.norm_label: extract model unique_ids from `dbt ls --output json` jsonl output.

nodes.label: Changed models (from `dbt ls`) plus their 1-hop model neighbors.

nodes.label: Run `dbt ls --select state:modified ... --output json` and return stdout.
nodes.norm_label: run `dbt ls --select state:modified ... --output json` and return stdout.

nodes.label: sqlquality — measure dbt model performance and complexity.
nodes.norm_label: sqlquality — measure dbt model performance and complexity.

nodes.label: Score the structural complexity of a single SQL file.
nodes.norm_label: score the structural complexity of a single sql file.

nodes.label: Gate a dbt change on the complexity delta of its changed models.
nodes.norm_label: gate a dbt change on the complexity delta of its changed models.

nodes.label: Lint a SQL file for best-practice violations (SQLFluff); --fix rewrites it.
nodes.norm_label: lint a sql file for best-practice violations (sqlfluff); --fix rewrites it.

nodes.label: Analyze a SQL file for performance anti-patterns (+ optional EXPLAIN plan).
nodes.norm_label: analyze a sql file for performance anti-patterns (+ optional explain plan).

nodes.label: Turn structural metrics (+ optional DAG facts) into a 0-100 complexity score.
nodes.norm_label: turn structural metrics (+ optional dag facts) into a 0-100 complexity score.

nodes.label: Compute a weighted composite complexity score.
nodes.norm_label: compute a weighted composite complexity score.

nodes.label: Load sqlquality.yml into typed config (with defaults).
nodes.norm_label: load sqlquality.yml into typed config (with defaults).

nodes.label: Load config from YAML, or return defaults if absent.
nodes.norm_label: load config from yaml, or return defaults if absent.

nodes.label: Read a dbt project's manifest.json (schema v12) as a model graph.
nodes.norm_label: read a dbt project's manifest.json (schema v12) as a model graph.

nodes.label: Raised when the manifest is malformed or a node is missing/uncompiled.
nodes.norm_label: raised when the manifest is malformed or a node is missing/uncompiled.

nodes.label: A loaded dbt manifest, indexed for model-graph queries.
nodes.norm_label: a loaded dbt manifest, indexed for model-graph queries.

nodes.label: Compute per-model complexity deltas between a baseline and candidate project.
nodes.norm_label: compute per-model complexity deltas between a baseline and candidate project.

nodes.label: Complexity composite for one model, or None if SQL missing/unparseable.
nodes.norm_label: complexity composite for one model, or none if sql missing/unparseable.

nodes.label: Score each changed model on candidate and baseline; return deltas + skips.
nodes.norm_label: score each changed model on candidate and baseline; return deltas + skips.

nodes.label: Apply gate config to model deltas to produce a pass/fail verdict.
nodes.norm_label: apply gate config to model deltas to produce a pass/fail verdict.

nodes.label: Flag regressions (over threshold, not waived); fail only in 'fail' mode.
nodes.norm_label: flag regressions (over threshold, not waived); fail only in 'fail' mode.

nodes.label: Redshift DISTKEY/SORTKEY inference from a model's JOIN/FILTER columns.
nodes.norm_label: redshift distkey/sortkey inference from a model's join/filter columns.

nodes.label: Suggest a DISTKEY (join keys) and SORTKEY (filter columns) for the model.
nodes.norm_label: suggest a distkey (join keys) and sortkey (filter columns) for the model.

nodes.label: Best-practice linting + auto-fix via SQLFluff's programmatic API.
nodes.norm_label: best-practice linting + auto-fix via sqlfluff's programmatic api.

nodes.norm_label: lint one sql string; return findings (parse errors included as prs).

nodes.label: Return SQL with SQLFluff auto-fixes applied (unchanged if unparseable).
nodes.norm_label: return sql with sqlfluff auto-fixes applied (unchanged if unparseable).

nodes.label: Raw structural complexity counts for one SQL statement.
nodes.norm_label: raw structural complexity counts for one sql statement.

nodes.label: A model's position in the dbt DAG (0 when unknown/offline).
nodes.norm_label: a model's position in the dbt dag (0 when unknown/offline).

nodes.label: A weighted 0-100 complexity score with per-component contributions.
nodes.norm_label: a weighted 0-100 complexity score with per-component contributions.

nodes.norm_label: json-serializable summary of a gate report.

nodes.label: A self-contained HTML report (no external assets).
nodes.norm_label: a self-contained html report (no external assets).

nodes.norm_label: raised when a sql string cannot be parsed for the given dialect.
